scripts.setup:cesium: node -e "const {cpSync,mkdirSync,existsSync}=require('fs');const src='node_modules/cesium/Build/Cesium';const dst='public/cesium';mkdirSync(dst,{recursive:true});['Workers','Assets','Widgets','ThirdParty'].forEach(d=>{if(existsSync(src+'/'+d))cpSync(src+'/'+d,dst+'/'+d,{recursive:true})});const {createReadStream,createWriteStream}=require('fs');createReadStream(src+'/Cesium.js').pipe(createWriteStream(dst+'/Cesium.js'));console.log('✅ Cesium assets ready in public/cesium/');"
